hero.badge: Your path to inner peace starts here
hero.subtitle: Guided meditations, breathing exercises, and personalized wellness tools — all in one place. Take a deep breath. You're in the right place.

features.label: What We Offer
features.subtitle: Simple, science-backed tools designed to help you reduce stress, sleep better, and find clarity — in just a few minutes a day.
features.card1_desc: Audio sessions from 2 to 30 minutes. For focus, stress relief, sleep, and mindfulness — at any level.
features.card2_desc: Proven techniques with visual guidance. Box Breathing, 4-7-8, and more — for instant calm, anytime.
features.card3_desc: Mood check-ins, streak tracking, habit logging — see your progress and understand your patterns.
features.card4_desc: Tell us your goals and we'll create a plan that fits. Recommendations that adapt to your mood and moment.

howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.step1_desc: Take our short wellness quiz. We'll learn your goals, stress level, and experience with mindfulness.
howItWorks.step2_desc: Receive a personalized wellness report with curated sessions and recommendations, just for you.
howItWorks.step3_desc: Press play, close your eyes, and let the journey begin. Your first moment of calm is just a tap away.

preview.label: Popular Sessions
preview.subtitle: A growing library of meditations, sleep stories, soundscapes, and more — crafted by wellness experts.

metrics.m1_label: report less stress after just 2 weeks of daily practice
metrics.m2_label: people have found their calm using our guided sessions
metrics.m3_label: average rating from our community of practitioners

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.t1_text: I never thought I could meditate. This portal made it so simple — just press play and breathe. My sleep has never been better.
testimonials.t2_text: The SOS breathing exercises are a lifesaver. When anxiety hits at work, I open the portal and feel calm in under 2 minutes.
testimonials.t3_text: The mood tracking helped me realize how much better I feel on days when I take even 5 minutes for myself. It changed my routine.

finalCta.body: You don't need to change everything at once. Start with a single breath, a single moment of stillness. We'll guide you from there.
finalCta.note: No credit card required. Access with your wellness code.

auth.signup_subtitle: Enter your phone number and the access code you received.
auth.login_subtitle: Log in with your phone number and access code.
auth.no_code: Don't have an access code yet?
auth.no_code_info: Access codes are provided with your wellness subscription. Contact your provider.

auth.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

onboarding.step2_body: 95% of our members report feeling less stressed after just a few minutes a day.
